name: Ghost König
description:
König isn't dead but he is a ghost trapped in the house where he was shot. When you enter the house, it gives him someone to play with and relieve his boredom.

Art by majormelon1.

Apparently the filter didn't like Ghost König's ass even though it barely showed anything. I'll fix it at a later date. Have his Halloween skin in the meantime.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
